TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Tokelau kanatal == Tokelau kanatal, telangay a sowal Union Islands han, Tokelau kanatal (nai 'ayaw no 1976 mihecaan o nian ko pasowal), itiniay katimolay Taypinyang o no New Zealand a sa'etal, sofal i sa'amisan no Samoa kanatal (N8-10, W171-178), na o Atafu, Nukunonu ato Fakafu toloay karatan kanatal a masakapot. Likisi O mikingkiway pahapinang, salongan 'ayaw no 1000 mihecaan, Tokelau kanatal kanatal iraay to ko maro'ay tamdaw saan. mitooray to kawakawasan no Polynesia ato no niyaro'ay "Tokelau" kawas ko finawlan. Midotoc to rami'adan, macowat to tekedan a onkak ato nisanga'an nangra. O sician no na toloay karatan kanatal misatekeday ko pidemak, padoedoay to syakay ato sowal ko karikec. O syakay no Tokelau kanatal na o sangasaw ko mikowanay, talacowa ira ko mimingay kasasiwtoc ato lalood no liyok i, ato kararamod. O da'oc to saka'orip ko nihaenan nangra, o foting ato 'afinong ko kakaenen to saka'orip. I 1765 miheca 6 folad 24 romi'ad, sa'ayaway pakanengneng o Europe tamdaw ci John Byron. Saka sa cisowal sa tonini kanatal "Ni york a kanatal" han. Oya misolapay sakapot ningra a sowal, awaay ko iraay ato 'ayaay tamdaw a nengnengen saan. masapinang to ni Edward Edwards ko nikanengneng ni John Byron itiya i, i 1791 miheca 6 folad 6 romi'ad pilicay ni Atafu mikilimay to 'ekim a miliyangay. Awaay ko maro'ay tamdaw saan, nika ira ko nisanga'an a dadangoyan ato sapifoting a talo'an, mato pahapinangay iraay ko tamdaw itini romaroma a kanatal a mifotingay saka ira ko nipatirengan a talo'an. I 1791 miheca 6 folad 12 roi'ad, padoedo haca pasitimol ko rakat no tamina ni Edward Edwards, manengneng haca ko Nukunonu kanatal, pangangan han to "Ni Clarence kanatal" han to. Talasekal ko nisolapay i caay ka sasilicay to finawlan, nika manengneng ko masafanaway kanatal romakatay a dadangoyan itiya. I 1825 miheca 10 folad 29 romi'ad, tangasa i Nukunonu liyokay kanatal koya fafoy no riyar sanay a tamina no sofitay i August R. Strong ato sinying. I 1835 miheca 2 folad 14 romi'ad, miisoay tamina kakeridan ci Jackson no Amilika a sinciw ci Smith sowal sa, manengneng ningra ko Fakaofu, saka panganganen to "De Wolf kanatal" han. I 1841 miheca 1 folad 25 romi'ad, misolapay no Amilika milicay ci Atafuan, saka manengneng ko papinapinaay maro'ay tamdaw itini kanatal. Mato pacarcaray maro' itini a nengnengen, nawhani awaay ko kakeridan naira, saci dadangoyan sa o tatosaay tamdaw matiya o mirarakatay tina kanatal nengnengen. I'ayaw mato iraay ko kasasinaol nangra to roma kitakit a tamdaw, nawhani pahapinang cangra to kangalay no kalali'aca i misolapay to dafong, saka o iraay ko romaay kitakit a dafong nangra: kangdaway cincu ato aylon. Ikor no pina romi'ad, misolapay no France ci Morven minengneng aca ko Fakaof. O misolapay no Amilika i 1841 miheca 1 folad 28 romi'ad tangasa i Nukunonu, nika awaay ko tilid aca to pakayniay finawlan a rotoh. I 1841 miheca 1 folad 29 romi'ad, minengneng aca ko Fakaof sa pangangan hananay to "Baovich" itiya. o Fakaof finawlan masapinang ko pinangan ato wayway matiya o Atafu a finawlan saan. I 1845 miheca tangasa 1870 miheca, o dintosi mipatenak to Kristokiw i Tokelau. O itiraay i Wallis kanatal nano France dintosi no Tinsokiw ato Samoa London Kristo dinkiwsi pakayni malasingsiay ko sakapaso'elin no Tokelau tamdaw. finawlan no Atafo paso'elin to Kristokiw, oya finawlan no Nukunonu paso'elin to no Tinsokiw, oya finawlan no Fakaofu malitosaay kiwha ko pitooran. I 1870 miheca, o London dinkiwsi ci Samuel James Whitmer foksi milicay to Tokelau. I 1889 miheca, ola o nidipotan no Inkiris. I 1916 miheca, palakapotan i "Gilbert ato Ellis kanatal". I 1926 miheca miteka, oya Tokelau kanatal mapatodong i kitakit no New Zealand sakowan. I 1948 miheca, oya Tokelau kanatal patorodan no Inkiris palekapot i New Zealand sakowan. Kaitiraan Tokelau kanatal nai Atafu, Nukunonu ato Fakafu toloay karat kanatal a lekapot, oni toloay karat a kanatal itini i W171 – 173, S8 – 10 (salngan sasifo'an no Hawai ato New Zealanad), paka'amis ko Atafo, pakatimol Fakafu. O Tokelau kanatal to ka'amis to katimol ira ko 200 kongli ko raraay. Tokelau kanatal ka'amis no Samoa to 500 kongli (311m), o Tokelau kanatal itiniay i kasafaniyot no romi'ad, polong no kaitiraan salongan 10.5 ko dadahal (4.2 m), itira i kasakarat no sekal ko kamaro'an, satakaraway 5 laya' (16 m) ko takaraw no sera . Oni toloay a kanatal ira ko minato, manga'ay kalalicolo'an to mirarakatay ato dafong, nika caay ka nga'ay no tata'akay tamina micafer . O Swindo kanatal malecaday ko likisi to Tokelau kanatal, nika 'ayaw to ikor to no 1900 mihecaan o Amilika ko mikowanay, nai 1925 miheca mapakapot to Samoa no Amilika mokowan . Midotoc to no Guano kanatal a rikec, o Atafu, Nukunonu, Fakafu ato Swins kanatal saheto o Amilika sofal to. I 1979 miheca, o Amilika ato New Zealand a nitelekan o Atafu, Nukunonu, Fakafu ato Swins patodongan to i Tokelau kanatal, masapinang ko Tokelau ato Samoa no Amilika ko sinala'ed. Kaitiraan no Tokelau kanatal liyok no karat Taliyok Tokelau kanatal itiniay i kaetip Polynesia fa'edetay so'emet kalakilangan kanaira no pala sa'etal. Polong a malengaway ma'awid to no 'afinong ko nipalomaan, mafalah to, o nipalomaan to roma kilangan. Taliyok no kanatal i Tokelau ira ko 38 a kasasiroma no malengaway kilang, 150 ko sasiroma no fao ato 10 no sekalan a kalang ko kahiceraan naira. O sakalatiih no adihayay kasaira no pinalengaw oya nipacomodan a pakaenan pinanowan kaenen ko sakakari'ang, tinako Polynesia edo. I 2011 miheca, mihapiw ko Tokelau kanatal polong no 319,031 km (123,179 ml) no liyok o sa'etal no kicay padipotan ko tatafik a sa'etal. Kicay Sakaira no itiniay saheto o sofal a sa'etal a ngangan .tk mitokian, no 'afinong a losay kali'aca, kitti li'aca ato piharatengan payci ato pinana'ang a payso. Maledef ko 'afinong, kowa' a losay, sakaira no kicay o nipakaenan a fafoy ato pifotingan. Miteka nai 2012 miheca 10 folad, o sakacidingki no Tokelau kanatal o no cidalan ko sakacidingki . Ponka O Tokelau finacadan a sowal ko sowal no Tokelau kanatal, o nano Polynesia sangasaw a sowal, ira ko 3200 tamdaw ko somowalay to sowal, malecad no Tuvalu a sowal ko sakalalicay kasasowalen. Picaliwan minengneng 7.Tokelau High Point - Peakbagger.com. www.peakbagger.com. (2020-05-15). (原始內容存檔於2021-03-03). 10.Port of Fakaofo. MarineTraffic.com. (9 March 2017). (原始內容存檔於9 March 2017).
S.PHON: == to~ukəɾao~u~u kanataɾ == to~ukəɾao~u~u kanataɾ, təɾaŋaj a so~uwaɾ o~u~unio~un isɾanɬ~ɮs ħan, to~ukəɾao~u~u kanataɾ (nai ʡajaw no~u **** miħəʦaan o~u nian ko~u paso~uwaɾ), itiniaj katimo~uɾaj tajpinjaŋ o~u no~u nəw *əaɾanɬ~ɮ a saʡətaɾ, so~ufaɾ i saʡamisan no~u samo~ua kanataɾ (n*-**, w***-***), na o~u atafo~u~u, no~u~uko~u~uno~uno~u~u ato~u fakafo~u~u to~uɾo~uaj karatan kanataɾ a masakapo~ut. ɾikisi o~u mikiŋkiwaj paħapinaŋ, saɾo~uŋan ʡajaw no~u **** miħəʦaan, to~ukəɾao~u~u kanataɾ kanataɾ iraaj to~u ko~u maro~uʡaj tamɬ~ɮaw saan. mito~uo~uraj to~u kawakawasan no~u po~uɾjnəsia ato~u no~u nijaro~uʡaj "to~ukəɾao~u~u" kawas ko~u finawɾan. miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~u ramiʡaɬ~ɮan, maʦo~uwat to~u təkəɬ~ɮan a o~unkak ato~u nisaŋaʡan naŋra. o~u siʦian no~u na to~uɾo~uaj karatan kanataɾ misatəkəɬ~ɮaj ko~u piɬ~ɮəmak, paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~uaj to~u sjakaj ato~u so~uwaɾ ko~u karikəʦ. o~u sjakaj no~u to~ukəɾao~u~u kanataɾ na o~u saŋasaw ko~u miko~uwanaj, taɾaʦo~uwa ira ko~u mimiŋaj kasasiwto~uʦ ato~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾijo~uk i, ato~u kararamo~uɬ~ɮ. o~u ɬ~ɮaʡo~uʦ to~u sakaʡo~urip ko~u niħaənan naŋra, o~u fo~utiŋ ato~u ʡafino~uŋ ko~u kakaənən to~u sakaʡo~urip. i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, saʡajawaj pakanəŋnəŋ o~u əo~u~uro~upə tamɬ~ɮaw ʦi *o~uħn b~b~vjro~un. saka sa ʦiso~uwaɾ sa to~unini kanataɾ "ni jo~urk a kanataɾ" ħan. o~uja miso~uɾapaj sakapo~ut niŋra a so~uwaɾ, awaaj ko~u iraaj ato~u ʡajaaj tamɬ~ɮaw a nəŋnəŋən saan. masapinaŋ to~u ni əɬ~ɮwarɬ~ɮ əɬ~ɮwarɬ~ɮs ko~u nikanəŋnəŋ ni *o~uħn b~b~vjro~un itija i, i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ piɾiʦaj ni atafo~u~u mikiɾimaj to~u ʡəkim a miɾijaŋaj. awaaj ko~u maro~uʡaj tamɬ~ɮaw saan, nika ira ko~u nisaŋaʡan a ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaŋo~ujan ato~u sapifo~utiŋ a taɾo~uʡan, mato~u paħapinaŋaj iraaj ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw itini ro~umaro~uma a kanataɾ a mifo~utiŋaj saka ira ko~u nipatirəŋan a taɾo~uʡan. i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~uiʡaɬ~ɮ, paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u ħaʦa pasitimo~uɾ ko~u rakat no~u tamina ni əɬ~ɮwarɬ~ɮ əɬ~ɮwarɬ~ɮs, manəŋnəŋ ħaʦa ko~u no~u~uko~u~uno~uno~u~u kanataɾ, paŋaŋan ħan to~u "ni ʦɾarənʦə kanataɾ" ħan to~u. taɾasəkaɾ ko~u niso~uɾapaj i ʦaaj ka sasiɾiʦaj to~u finawɾan, nika manəŋnəŋ ko~u masafanawaj kanataɾ ro~umakataj a ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaŋo~ujan itija. i **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, taŋasa i no~u~uko~u~uno~uno~u~u ɾijo~ukaj kanataɾ ko~uja fafo~uj no~u rijar sanaj a tamina no~u so~ufitaj i ao~u~u*o~u~ust r. stro~uŋ ato~u sinjiŋ. i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, miiso~uaj tamina kakəriɬ~ɮan ʦi *aʦkso~un no~u amiɾika a sinʦiw ʦi smitħ so~uwaɾ sa, manəŋnəŋ niŋra ko~u fakao~ufo~u~u, saka paŋaŋanən to~u "ɬ~ɮə wo~uɾf kanataɾ" ħan. i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, miso~uɾapaj no~u amiɾika miɾiʦaj ʦi atafo~u~uan, saka manəŋnəŋ ko~u papinapinaaj maro~uʡaj tamɬ~ɮaw itini kanataɾ. mato~u paʦarʦaraj maro~uʡ itini a nəŋnəŋən, nawħani awaaj ko~u kakəriɬ~ɮan naira, saʦi ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaŋo~ujan sa o~u tato~usaaj tamɬ~ɮaw matija o~u mirarakataj tina kanataɾ nəŋnəŋən. iʡajaw mato~u iraaj ko~u kasasinao~uɾ naŋra to~u ro~uma kitakit a tamɬ~ɮaw, nawħani paħapinaŋ ʦaŋra to~u kaŋaɾaj no~u kaɾaɾiʡaʦa i miso~uɾapaj to~u ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ, saka o~u iraaj ko~u ro~umaaj kitakit a ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ naŋra: kaŋɬ~ɮawaj ʦinʦo~u~u ato~u ajɾo~un. iko~ur no~u pina ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, miso~uɾapaj no~u franʦə ʦi mo~urb~vən minəŋnəŋ aʦa ko~u fakao~uf. o~u miso~uɾapaj no~u amiɾika i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ taŋasa i no~u~uko~u~uno~uno~u~u, nika awaaj ko~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ aʦa to~u pakajniaj finawɾan a ro~uto~uħ. i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, minəŋnəŋ aʦa ko~u fakao~uf sa paŋaŋan ħananaj to~u "b~b~vao~ub~viʦħ" itija. o~u fakao~uf finawɾan masapinaŋ ko~u pinaŋan ato~u wajwaj matija o~u atafo~u~u a finawɾan saan. i **** miħəʦa taŋasa **** miħəʦa, o~u ɬ~ɮinto~usi mipatənak to~u kristo~ukiw i to~ukəɾao~u~u. o~u itiraaj i waɾɾis kanataɾ nano~u franʦə ɬ~ɮinto~usi no~u tinso~ukiw ato~u samo~ua ɾo~unɬ~ɮo~un kristo~u ɬ~ɮinkiwsi pakajni maɾasiŋsiaj ko~u sakapaso~uʡəɾin no~u to~ukəɾao~u~u tamɬ~ɮaw. finawɾan no~u atafo~u paso~uʡəɾin to~u kristo~ukiw, o~uja finawɾan no~u no~u~uko~u~uno~uno~u~u paso~uʡəɾin to~u no~u tinso~ukiw, o~uja finawɾan no~u fakao~ufo~u~u maɾito~usaaj kiwħa ko~u pito~uo~uran. i **** miħəʦa, o~u ɾo~unɬ~ɮo~un ɬ~ɮinkiwsi ʦi samo~u~uəɾ *aməs wħitmər fo~uksi miɾiʦaj to~u to~ukəɾao~u~u. i **** miħəʦa, o~uɾa o~u niɬ~ɮipo~utan no~u inkiris. i **** miħəʦa, paɾakapo~utan i "*iɾb~b~vərt ato~u əɾɾis kanataɾ". i **** miħəʦa mitəka, o~uja to~ukəɾao~u~u kanataɾ mapato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ i kitakit no~u nəw *əaɾanɬ~ɮ sako~uwan. i **** miħəʦa, o~uja to~ukəɾao~u~u kanataɾ pato~uro~uɬ~ɮan no~u inkiris paɾəkapo~ut i nəw *əaɾanɬ~ɮ sako~uwan. kaitiraan to~ukəɾao~u~u kanataɾ nai atafo~u~u, no~u~uko~u~uno~uno~u~u ato~u fakafo~u~u to~uɾo~uaj karat kanataɾ a ɾəkapo~ut, o~uni to~uɾo~uaj karat a kanataɾ itini i w*** * ***, s* * ** (saɾŋan sasifo~uʡan no~u ħawai ato~u nəw *əaɾanaɬ~ɮ), pakaʡamis ko~u atafo~u, pakatimo~uɾ fakafo~u~u. o~u to~ukəɾao~u~u kanataɾ to~u kaʡamis to~u katimo~uɾ ira ko~u *** ko~uŋɾi ko~u raraaj. to~ukəɾao~u~u kanataɾ kaʡamis no~u samo~ua to~u *** ko~uŋɾi (***m), o~u to~ukəɾao~u~u kanataɾ itiniaj i kasafanijo~ut no~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, po~uɾo~uŋ no~u kaitiraan saɾo~uŋan **.* ko~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaħaɾ (*.* m), itira i kasakarat no~u səkaɾ ko~u kamaro~uʡan, satakarawaj * ɾajaʡ (** m) ko~u takaraw no~u səra . o~uni to~uɾo~uaj a kanataɾ ira ko~u minato~u, maŋaʡaj kaɾaɾiʦo~uɾo~uʡan to~u mirarakataj ato~u ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ, nika ʦaaj ka ŋaʡaj no~u tataʡakaj tamina miʦafər . o~u swinɬ~ɮo~u kanataɾ maɾəʦaɬ~ɮaj ko~u ɾikisi to~u to~ukəɾao~u~u kanataɾ, nika ʡajaw to~u iko~ur to~u no~u **** miħəʦaan o~u amiɾika ko~u miko~uwanaj, nai **** miħəʦa mapakapo~ut to~u samo~ua no~u amiɾika mo~uko~uwan . miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~u no~u *o~u~uano~u kanataɾ a rikəʦ, o~u atafo~u~u, no~u~uko~u~uno~uno~u~u, fakafo~u~u ato~u swins kanataɾ saħəto~u o~u amiɾika so~ufaɾ to~u. i **** miħəʦa, o~u amiɾika ato~u nəw *əaɾanɬ~ɮ a nitəɾəkan o~u atafo~u~u, no~u~uko~u~uno~uno~u~u, fakafo~u~u ato~u swins pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan to~u i to~ukəɾao~u~u kanataɾ, masapinaŋ ko~u to~ukəɾao~u~u ato~u samo~ua no~u amiɾika ko~u sinaɾaʡəɬ~ɮ. kaitiraan no~u to~ukəɾao~u~u kanataɾ ɾijo~uk no~u karat taɾijo~uk to~ukəɾao~u~u kanataɾ itiniaj i kaətip po~uɾjnəsia faʡəɬ~ɮətaj so~uʡəmət kaɾakiɾaŋan kanaira no~u paɾa saʡətaɾ. po~uɾo~uŋ a maɾəŋawaj maʡawiɬ~ɮ to~u no~u ʡafino~uŋ ko~u nipaɾo~umaan, mafaɾaħ to~u, o~u nipaɾo~umaan to~u ro~uma kiɾaŋan. taɾijo~uk no~u kanataɾ i to~ukəɾao~u~u ira ko~u ** a kasasiro~uma no~u maɾəŋawaj kiɾaŋ, *** ko~u sasiro~uma no~u fao~u ato~u ** no~u səkaɾan a kaɾaŋ ko~u kaħiʦəraan naira. o~u sakaɾatiiħ no~u aɬ~ɮiħajaj kasaira no~u pinaɾəŋaw o~uja nipaʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮan a pakaənan pinano~uwan kaənən ko~u sakakariʡaŋ, tinako~u po~uɾjnəsia əɬ~ɮo~u. i **** miħəʦa, miħapiw ko~u to~ukəɾao~u~u kanataɾ po~uɾo~uŋ no~u ***,*** km (***,*** mɾ) no~u ɾijo~uk o~u saʡətaɾ no~u kiʦaj paɬ~ɮipo~utan ko~u tatafik a saʡətaɾ. kiʦaj sakaira no~u itiniaj saħəto~u o~u so~ufaɾ a saʡətaɾ a ŋaŋan .tk mito~ukian, no~u ʡafino~uŋ a ɾo~usaj kaɾiʡaʦa, kitti ɾiʡaʦa ato~u piħaratəŋan pajʦi ato~u pinanaʡaŋ a pajso~u. maɾəɬ~ɮəf ko~u ʡafino~uŋ, ko~uwaʡ a ɾo~usaj, sakaira no~u kiʦaj o~u nipakaənan a fafo~uj ato~u pifo~utiŋan. mitəka nai **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, o~u sakaʦiɬ~ɮiŋki no~u to~ukəɾao~u~u kanataɾ o~u no~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾan ko~u sakaʦiɬ~ɮiŋki . po~unka o~u to~ukəɾao~u~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan a so~uwaɾ ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u to~ukəɾao~u~u kanataɾ, o~u nano~u po~uɾjnəsia saŋasaw a so~uwaɾ, ira ko~u **** tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u so~umo~uwaɾaj to~u so~uwaɾ, maɾəʦaɬ~ɮ no~u to~u~ub~vaɾo~u~u a so~uwaɾ ko~u sakaɾaɾiʦaj kasaso~uwaɾən. piʦaɾiwan minəŋnəŋ *.to~ukəɾao~u~u ħi*ħ po~uint - pəakb~b~va**ər.ʦo~um. www.pəakb~b~va**ər.ʦo~um. (****-**-**). (***********-**-**). **.po~urt o~uf fakao~ufo~u. marinətraffiʦ.ʦo~um. (* marʦħ ****). (******** marʦħ ****).
S.FORM: == Tokelau kanatal == Tokelau kanatal, telangay a sowal Union Islands han, Tokelau kanatal (nai 'ayaw no 1976 mihecaan o nian ko pasowal), itiniay katimolay Taypinyang o no New Zealand a sa'etal, sofal i sa'amisan no Samoa kanatal (N8-10, W171-178), na o Atafu, Nukunonu ato Fakafu toloay karatan kanatal a masakapot. Likisi O mikingkiway pahapinang, salongan 'ayaw no 1000 mihecaan, Tokelau kanatal kanatal iraay to ko maro'ay tamdaw saan. mitooray to kawakawasan no Polynesia ato no niyaro'ay "Tokelau" kawas ko finawlan. Midotoc to rami'adan, macowat to tekedan a onkak ato nisanga'an nangra. O sician no na toloay karatan kanatal misatekeday ko pidemak, padoedoay to syakay ato sowal ko karikec. O syakay no Tokelau kanatal na o sangasaw ko mikowanay, talacowa ira ko mimingay kasasiwtoc ato lalood no liyok i, ato kararamod. O da'oc to saka'orip ko nihaenan nangra, o foting ato 'afinong ko kakaenen to saka'orip. I 1765 miheca 6 folad 24 romi'ad, sa'ayaway pakanengneng o Europe tamdaw ci John Byron. Saka sa cisowal sa tonini kanatal "Ni york a kanatal" han. Oya misolapay sakapot ningra a sowal, awaay ko iraay ato 'ayaay tamdaw a nengnengen saan. masapinang to ni Edward Edwards ko nikanengneng ni John Byron itiya i, i 1791 miheca 6 folad 6 romi'ad pilicay ni Atafu mikilimay to 'ekim a miliyangay. Awaay ko maro'ay tamdaw saan, nika ira ko nisanga'an a dadangoyan ato sapifoting a talo'an, mato pahapinangay iraay ko tamdaw itini romaroma a kanatal a mifotingay saka ira ko nipatirengan a talo'an. I 1791 miheca 6 folad 12 roi'ad, padoedo haca pasitimol ko rakat no tamina ni Edward Edwards, manengneng haca ko Nukunonu kanatal, pangangan han to "Ni Clarence kanatal" han to. Talasekal ko nisolapay i caay ka sasilicay to finawlan, nika manengneng ko masafanaway kanatal romakatay a dadangoyan itiya. I 1825 miheca 10 folad 29 romi'ad, tangasa i Nukunonu liyokay kanatal koya fafoy no riyar sanay a tamina no sofitay i August R. Strong ato sinying. I 1835 miheca 2 folad 14 romi'ad, miisoay tamina kakeridan ci Jackson no Amilika a sinciw ci Smith sowal sa, manengneng ningra ko Fakaofu, saka panganganen to "De Wolf kanatal" han. I 1841 miheca 1 folad 25 romi'ad, misolapay no Amilika milicay ci Atafuan, saka manengneng ko papinapinaay maro'ay tamdaw itini kanatal. Mato pacarcaray maro' itini a nengnengen, nawhani awaay ko kakeridan naira, saci dadangoyan sa o tatosaay tamdaw matiya o mirarakatay tina kanatal nengnengen. I'ayaw mato iraay ko kasasinaol nangra to roma kitakit a tamdaw, nawhani pahapinang cangra to kangalay no kalali'aca i misolapay to dafong, saka o iraay ko romaay kitakit a dafong nangra: kangdaway cincu ato aylon. Ikor no pina romi'ad, misolapay no France ci Morven minengneng aca ko Fakaof. O misolapay no Amilika i 1841 miheca 1 folad 28 romi'ad tangasa i Nukunonu, nika awaay ko tilid aca to pakayniay finawlan a rotoh. I 1841 miheca 1 folad 29 romi'ad, minengneng aca ko Fakaof sa pangangan hananay to "Baovich" itiya. o Fakaof finawlan masapinang ko pinangan ato wayway matiya o Atafu a finawlan saan. I 1845 miheca tangasa 1870 miheca, o dintosi mipatenak to Kristokiw i Tokelau. O itiraay i Wallis kanatal nano France dintosi no Tinsokiw ato Samoa London Kristo dinkiwsi pakayni malasingsiay ko sakapaso'elin no Tokelau tamdaw. finawlan no Atafo paso'elin to Kristokiw, oya finawlan no Nukunonu paso'elin to no Tinsokiw, oya finawlan no Fakaofu malitosaay kiwha ko pitooran. I 1870 miheca, o London dinkiwsi ci Samuel James Whitmer foksi milicay to Tokelau. I 1889 miheca, ola o nidipotan no Inkiris. I 1916 miheca, palakapotan i "Gilbert ato Ellis kanatal". I 1926 miheca miteka, oya Tokelau kanatal mapatodong i kitakit no New Zealand sakowan. I 1948 miheca, oya Tokelau kanatal patorodan no Inkiris palekapot i New Zealand sakowan. Kaitiraan Tokelau kanatal nai Atafu, Nukunonu ato Fakafu toloay karat kanatal a lekapot, oni toloay karat a kanatal itini i W171 – 173, S8 – 10 (salngan sasifo'an no Hawai ato New Zealanad), paka'amis ko Atafo, pakatimol Fakafu. O Tokelau kanatal to ka'amis to katimol ira ko 200 kongli ko raraay. Tokelau kanatal ka'amis no Samoa to 500 kongli (311m), o Tokelau kanatal itiniay i kasafaniyot no romi'ad, polong no kaitiraan salongan 10.5 ko dadahal (4.2 m), itira i kasakarat no sekal ko kamaro'an, satakaraway 5 laya' (16 m) ko takaraw no sera . Oni toloay a kanatal ira ko minato, manga'ay kalalicolo'an to mirarakatay ato dafong, nika caay ka nga'ay no tata'akay tamina micafer . O Swindo kanatal malecaday ko likisi to Tokelau kanatal, nika 'ayaw to ikor to no 1900 mihecaan o Amilika ko mikowanay, nai 1925 miheca mapakapot to Samoa no Amilika mokowan . Midotoc to no Guano kanatal a rikec, o Atafu, Nukunonu, Fakafu ato Swins kanatal saheto o Amilika sofal to. I 1979 miheca, o Amilika ato New Zealand a nitelekan o Atafu, Nukunonu, Fakafu ato Swins patodongan to i Tokelau kanatal, masapinang ko Tokelau ato Samoa no Amilika ko sinala'ed. Kaitiraan no Tokelau kanatal liyok no karat Taliyok Tokelau kanatal itiniay i kaetip Polynesia fa'edetay so'emet kalakilangan kanaira no pala sa'etal. Polong a malengaway ma'awid to no 'afinong ko nipalomaan, mafalah to, o nipalomaan to roma kilangan. Taliyok no kanatal i Tokelau ira ko 38 a kasasiroma no malengaway kilang, 150 ko sasiroma no fao ato 10 no sekalan a kalang ko kahiceraan naira. O sakalatiih no adihayay kasaira no pinalengaw oya nipacomodan a pakaenan pinanowan kaenen ko sakakari'ang, tinako Polynesia edo. I 2011 miheca, mihapiw ko Tokelau kanatal polong no 319,031 km (123,179 ml) no liyok o sa'etal no kicay padipotan ko tatafik a sa'etal. Kicay Sakaira no itiniay saheto o sofal a sa'etal a ngangan .tk mitokian, no 'afinong a losay kali'aca, kitti li'aca ato piharatengan payci ato pinana'ang a payso. Maledef ko 'afinong, kowa' a losay, sakaira no kicay o nipakaenan a fafoy ato pifotingan. Miteka nai 2012 miheca 10 folad, o sakacidingki no Tokelau kanatal o no cidalan ko sakacidingki . Ponka O Tokelau finacadan a sowal ko sowal no Tokelau kanatal, o nano Polynesia sangasaw a sowal, ira ko 3200 tamdaw ko somowalay to sowal, malecad no Tuvalu a sowal ko sakalalicay kasasowalen. Picaliwan minengneng 7.Tokelau High Point - Peakbagger.com. www.peakbagger.com. (2020-05-15). (原始內容存檔於2021-03-03). 10.Port of Fakaofo. MarineTraffic.com. (9 March 2017). (原始內容存檔於9 March 2017).
S.PHON: == to~ukəɾao~u~u kanataɾ == to~ukəɾao~u~u kanataɾ, təɾaŋaj a so~uwaɾ o~u~unio~un isɾanɬ~ɮs ħan, to~ukəɾao~u~u kanataɾ (nai ʡajaw no~u **** miħəʦaan o~u nian ko~u paso~uwaɾ), itiniaj katimo~uɾaj tajpinjaŋ o~u no~u nəw *əaɾanɬ~ɮ a saʡətaɾ, so~ufaɾ i saʡamisan no~u samo~ua kanataɾ (n*-**, w***-***), na o~u atafo~u~u, no~u~uko~u~uno~uno~u~u ato~u fakafo~u~u to~uɾo~uaj karatan kanataɾ a masakapo~ut. ɾikisi o~u mikiŋkiwaj paħapinaŋ, saɾo~uŋan ʡajaw no~u **** miħəʦaan, to~ukəɾao~u~u kanataɾ kanataɾ iraaj to~u ko~u maro~uʡaj tamɬ~ɮaw saan. mito~uo~uraj to~u kawakawasan no~u po~uɾjnəsia ato~u no~u nijaro~uʡaj "to~ukəɾao~u~u" kawas ko~u finawɾan. miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~u ramiʡaɬ~ɮan, maʦo~uwat to~u təkəɬ~ɮan a o~unkak ato~u nisaŋaʡan naŋra. o~u siʦian no~u na to~uɾo~uaj karatan kanataɾ misatəkəɬ~ɮaj ko~u piɬ~ɮəmak, paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~uaj to~u sjakaj ato~u so~uwaɾ ko~u karikəʦ. o~u sjakaj no~u to~ukəɾao~u~u kanataɾ na o~u saŋasaw ko~u miko~uwanaj, taɾaʦo~uwa ira ko~u mimiŋaj kasasiwto~uʦ ato~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾijo~uk i, ato~u kararamo~uɬ~ɮ. o~u ɬ~ɮaʡo~uʦ to~u sakaʡo~urip ko~u niħaənan naŋra, o~u fo~utiŋ ato~u ʡafino~uŋ ko~u kakaənən to~u sakaʡo~urip. i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, saʡajawaj pakanəŋnəŋ o~u əo~u~uro~upə tamɬ~ɮaw ʦi *o~uħn b~b~vjro~un. saka sa ʦiso~uwaɾ sa to~unini kanataɾ "ni jo~urk a kanataɾ" ħan. o~uja miso~uɾapaj sakapo~ut niŋra a so~uwaɾ, awaaj ko~u iraaj ato~u ʡajaaj tamɬ~ɮaw a nəŋnəŋən saan. masapinaŋ to~u ni əɬ~ɮwarɬ~ɮ əɬ~ɮwarɬ~ɮs ko~u nikanəŋnəŋ ni *o~uħn b~b~vjro~un itija i, i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ piɾiʦaj ni atafo~u~u mikiɾimaj to~u ʡəkim a miɾijaŋaj. awaaj ko~u maro~uʡaj tamɬ~ɮaw saan, nika ira ko~u nisaŋaʡan a ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaŋo~ujan ato~u sapifo~utiŋ a taɾo~uʡan, mato~u paħapinaŋaj iraaj ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw itini ro~umaro~uma a kanataɾ a mifo~utiŋaj saka ira ko~u nipatirəŋan a taɾo~uʡan. i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~uiʡaɬ~ɮ, paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u ħaʦa pasitimo~uɾ ko~u rakat no~u tamina ni əɬ~ɮwarɬ~ɮ əɬ~ɮwarɬ~ɮs, manəŋnəŋ ħaʦa ko~u no~u~uko~u~uno~uno~u~u kanataɾ, paŋaŋan ħan to~u "ni ʦɾarənʦə kanataɾ" ħan to~u. taɾasəkaɾ ko~u niso~uɾapaj i ʦaaj ka sasiɾiʦaj to~u finawɾan, nika manəŋnəŋ ko~u masafanawaj kanataɾ ro~umakataj a ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaŋo~ujan itija. i **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, taŋasa i no~u~uko~u~uno~uno~u~u ɾijo~ukaj kanataɾ ko~uja fafo~uj no~u rijar sanaj a tamina no~u so~ufitaj i ao~u~u*o~u~ust r. stro~uŋ ato~u sinjiŋ. i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, miiso~uaj tamina kakəriɬ~ɮan ʦi *aʦkso~un no~u amiɾika a sinʦiw ʦi smitħ so~uwaɾ sa, manəŋnəŋ niŋra ko~u fakao~ufo~u~u, saka paŋaŋanən to~u "ɬ~ɮə wo~uɾf kanataɾ" ħan. i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, miso~uɾapaj no~u amiɾika miɾiʦaj ʦi atafo~u~uan, saka manəŋnəŋ ko~u papinapinaaj maro~uʡaj tamɬ~ɮaw itini kanataɾ. mato~u paʦarʦaraj maro~uʡ itini a nəŋnəŋən, nawħani awaaj ko~u kakəriɬ~ɮan naira, saʦi ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaŋo~ujan sa o~u tato~usaaj tamɬ~ɮaw matija o~u mirarakataj tina kanataɾ nəŋnəŋən. iʡajaw mato~u iraaj ko~u kasasinao~uɾ naŋra to~u ro~uma kitakit a tamɬ~ɮaw, nawħani paħapinaŋ ʦaŋra to~u kaŋaɾaj no~u kaɾaɾiʡaʦa i miso~uɾapaj to~u ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ, saka o~u iraaj ko~u ro~umaaj kitakit a ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ naŋra: kaŋɬ~ɮawaj ʦinʦo~u~u ato~u ajɾo~un. iko~ur no~u pina ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, miso~uɾapaj no~u franʦə ʦi mo~urb~vən minəŋnəŋ aʦa ko~u fakao~uf. o~u miso~uɾapaj no~u amiɾika i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ taŋasa i no~u~uko~u~uno~uno~u~u, nika awaaj ko~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ aʦa to~u pakajniaj finawɾan a ro~uto~uħ. i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, minəŋnəŋ aʦa ko~u fakao~uf sa paŋaŋan ħananaj to~u "b~b~vao~ub~viʦħ" itija. o~u fakao~uf finawɾan masapinaŋ ko~u pinaŋan ato~u wajwaj matija o~u atafo~u~u a finawɾan saan. i **** miħəʦa taŋasa **** miħəʦa, o~u ɬ~ɮinto~usi mipatənak to~u kristo~ukiw i to~ukəɾao~u~u. o~u itiraaj i waɾɾis kanataɾ nano~u franʦə ɬ~ɮinto~usi no~u tinso~ukiw ato~u samo~ua ɾo~unɬ~ɮo~un kristo~u ɬ~ɮinkiwsi pakajni maɾasiŋsiaj ko~u sakapaso~uʡəɾin no~u to~ukəɾao~u~u tamɬ~ɮaw. finawɾan no~u atafo~u paso~uʡəɾin to~u kristo~ukiw, o~uja finawɾan no~u no~u~uko~u~uno~uno~u~u paso~uʡəɾin to~u no~u tinso~ukiw, o~uja finawɾan no~u fakao~ufo~u~u maɾito~usaaj kiwħa ko~u pito~uo~uran. i **** miħəʦa, o~u ɾo~unɬ~ɮo~un ɬ~ɮinkiwsi ʦi samo~u~uəɾ *aməs wħitmər fo~uksi miɾiʦaj to~u to~ukəɾao~u~u. i **** miħəʦa, o~uɾa o~u niɬ~ɮipo~utan no~u inkiris. i **** miħəʦa, paɾakapo~utan i "*iɾb~b~vərt ato~u əɾɾis kanataɾ". i **** miħəʦa mitəka, o~uja to~ukəɾao~u~u kanataɾ mapato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ i kitakit no~u nəw *əaɾanɬ~ɮ sako~uwan. i **** miħəʦa, o~uja to~ukəɾao~u~u kanataɾ pato~uro~uɬ~ɮan no~u inkiris paɾəkapo~ut i nəw *əaɾanɬ~ɮ sako~uwan. kaitiraan to~ukəɾao~u~u kanataɾ nai atafo~u~u, no~u~uko~u~uno~uno~u~u ato~u fakafo~u~u to~uɾo~uaj karat kanataɾ a ɾəkapo~ut, o~uni to~uɾo~uaj karat a kanataɾ itini i w*** * ***, s* * ** (saɾŋan sasifo~uʡan no~u ħawai ato~u nəw *əaɾanaɬ~ɮ), pakaʡamis ko~u atafo~u, pakatimo~uɾ fakafo~u~u. o~u to~ukəɾao~u~u kanataɾ to~u kaʡamis to~u katimo~uɾ ira ko~u *** ko~uŋɾi ko~u raraaj. to~ukəɾao~u~u kanataɾ kaʡamis no~u samo~ua to~u *** ko~uŋɾi (***m), o~u to~ukəɾao~u~u kanataɾ itiniaj i kasafanijo~ut no~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, po~uɾo~uŋ no~u kaitiraan saɾo~uŋan **.* ko~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaħaɾ (*.* m), itira i kasakarat no~u səkaɾ ko~u kamaro~uʡan, satakarawaj * ɾajaʡ (** m) ko~u takaraw no~u səra . o~uni to~uɾo~uaj a kanataɾ ira ko~u minato~u, maŋaʡaj kaɾaɾiʦo~uɾo~uʡan to~u mirarakataj ato~u ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ, nika ʦaaj ka ŋaʡaj no~u tataʡakaj tamina miʦafər . o~u swinɬ~ɮo~u kanataɾ maɾəʦaɬ~ɮaj ko~u ɾikisi to~u to~ukəɾao~u~u kanataɾ, nika ʡajaw to~u iko~ur to~u no~u **** miħəʦaan o~u amiɾika ko~u miko~uwanaj, nai **** miħəʦa mapakapo~ut to~u samo~ua no~u amiɾika mo~uko~uwan . miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~u no~u *o~u~uano~u kanataɾ a rikəʦ, o~u atafo~u~u, no~u~uko~u~uno~uno~u~u, fakafo~u~u ato~u swins kanataɾ saħəto~u o~u amiɾika so~ufaɾ to~u. i **** miħəʦa, o~u amiɾika ato~u nəw *əaɾanɬ~ɮ a nitəɾəkan o~u atafo~u~u, no~u~uko~u~uno~uno~u~u, fakafo~u~u ato~u swins pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan to~u i to~ukəɾao~u~u kanataɾ, masapinaŋ ko~u to~ukəɾao~u~u ato~u samo~ua no~u amiɾika ko~u sinaɾaʡəɬ~ɮ. kaitiraan no~u to~ukəɾao~u~u kanataɾ ɾijo~uk no~u karat taɾijo~uk to~ukəɾao~u~u kanataɾ itiniaj i kaətip po~uɾjnəsia faʡəɬ~ɮətaj so~uʡəmət kaɾakiɾaŋan kanaira no~u paɾa saʡətaɾ. po~uɾo~uŋ a maɾəŋawaj maʡawiɬ~ɮ to~u no~u ʡafino~uŋ ko~u nipaɾo~umaan, mafaɾaħ to~u, o~u nipaɾo~umaan to~u ro~uma kiɾaŋan. taɾijo~uk no~u kanataɾ i to~ukəɾao~u~u ira ko~u ** a kasasiro~uma no~u maɾəŋawaj kiɾaŋ, *** ko~u sasiro~uma no~u fao~u ato~u ** no~u səkaɾan a kaɾaŋ ko~u kaħiʦəraan naira. o~u sakaɾatiiħ no~u aɬ~ɮiħajaj kasaira no~u pinaɾəŋaw o~uja nipaʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮan a pakaənan pinano~uwan kaənən ko~u sakakariʡaŋ, tinako~u po~uɾjnəsia əɬ~ɮo~u. i **** miħəʦa, miħapiw ko~u to~ukəɾao~u~u kanataɾ po~uɾo~uŋ no~u ***,*** km (***,*** mɾ) no~u ɾijo~uk o~u saʡətaɾ no~u kiʦaj paɬ~ɮipo~utan ko~u tatafik a saʡətaɾ. kiʦaj sakaira no~u itiniaj saħəto~u o~u so~ufaɾ a saʡətaɾ a ŋaŋan .tk mito~ukian, no~u ʡafino~uŋ a ɾo~usaj kaɾiʡaʦa, kitti ɾiʡaʦa ato~u piħaratəŋan pajʦi ato~u pinanaʡaŋ a pajso~u. maɾəɬ~ɮəf ko~u ʡafino~uŋ, ko~uwaʡ a ɾo~usaj, sakaira no~u kiʦaj o~u nipakaənan a fafo~uj ato~u pifo~utiŋan. mitəka nai **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, o~u sakaʦiɬ~ɮiŋki no~u to~ukəɾao~u~u kanataɾ o~u no~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾan ko~u sakaʦiɬ~ɮiŋki . po~unka o~u to~ukəɾao~u~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan a so~uwaɾ ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u to~ukəɾao~u~u kanataɾ, o~u nano~u po~uɾjnəsia saŋasaw a so~uwaɾ, ira ko~u **** tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u so~umo~uwaɾaj to~u so~uwaɾ, maɾəʦaɬ~ɮ no~u to~u~ub~vaɾo~u~u a so~uwaɾ ko~u sakaɾaɾiʦaj kasaso~uwaɾən. piʦaɾiwan minəŋnəŋ *.to~ukəɾao~u~u ħi*ħ po~uint - pəakb~b~va**ər.ʦo~um. www.pəakb~b~va**ər.ʦo~um.
